title: maxillaria calendulina
intro: Maxillaria calendulina, also known as the "Golden Orchid", is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Maxillaria calendulina include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
